name: Carrot Cake with Cream Cheese Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray an 8-inch tube pan with nonstick cooking spray and set aside.
2. Combine eggs, sugar, oil, and vanilla; beat well. With mixer at low speed, beat in milk powder, flour, baking soda, and cinnamon until thoroughly combined.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients. Pour into pan and bake for 40-45 minutes, until cake tests done.
4. Cool in pan for 5 minutes. Remove cake from pan; drizzle with CREAM CHEESE GLAZE.
